info.title: DotNetBumper
info.description: A .NET Global Tool that upgrades projects to a newer version of .NET.

options.name: --configuration-file
options.description: The path to a custom JSON or YAML configuration file to use, if any.

options.name: --channel
options.description: The .NET release channel to upgrade to in the format "major.minor".

options.name: --log-format
options.description: The log format to use. [default: None]

options.name: --log-path
options.description: The path to write the log file to, if any.

options.name: --no-logo
options.description: Do not display the startup banner.

options.name: --quality
options.description: The type of quality to use for .NET daily builds.

options.name: --upgrade-type
options.description: The type of upgrade to perform.

options.name: --test
options.description: Test the upgrade by running dotnet test on completion.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: The optional period to timeout the upgrade after.

options.name: --warnings-as-errors
options.description: Treat any warnings encountered during the upgrade as errors.

arguments.name: ProjectPath
arguments.description: The path to directory containing a .NET 6+ project to be upgraded. If not specified, the current directory will be used.
